human_role: The Explainer (Explains quantum superposition in simple terms to a child).
ai_role: The Clarity Checker (Provides feedback on the clarity and accessibility of the explanation).
human_expansion: Applying the Feynman Method to explain a notoriously complex quantum concept.

human_role: The Communicator (Explains the concept of a black hole’s event horizon).
ai_role: The Analogy Generator (Suggests an analogy to help visualize the event horizon).
human_expansion: Breaking down the concept of a black hole into understandable terms.

human_role: The Gene Translator (Explains how DNA encodes genetic information).
ai_role: The Visual Aid Proposer (Suggests a diagram or visual representation of the genetic code).
human_expansion: Simplifying the complex workings of the genetic code.

human_role: The Heat Explainer (Explains the concept of entropy and the second law of thermodynamics).
ai_role: The Analogy Provider (Suggests an analogy for understanding entropy).
human_expansion: Demystifying the equation and its implications.

human_role: The Reaction Reconstructor (Explains a complex chemical reaction, detailing reactants and products).
ai_role: The Reaction Simulator (Models the reaction and displays the changes).
human_expansion: Simplifying the process of chemical reactions.

human_role: The Earth Shaper (Explains the theory of plate tectonics).
ai_role: The Geological Model Viewer (Displays a 3D model of the Earth’s tectonic plates).
human_expansion: Making sense of the movement of continents and the formation of mountains.

human_role: The Synapse Connector (Explains how artificial neural networks learn).
ai_role: The Algorithm Visualizer (Provides a visual representation of the learning algorithm).

human_role: The Gravity Explained (Explains the concept of gravity as described by Einstein).
ai_role: The Space-Time Visualizer (Provides a visual representation of spacetime curvature).
human_expansion: Simplifying the theory of general relativity.

human_role: The Sound Wave Shifter (Explains the Doppler effect in terms of wave behavior).
ai_role: The Wave Simulation Tool (Demonstrates the Doppler effect with simulated waves).
human_expansion: Making sense of sound and light shift.

human_role: The Wave Categorizer (Explains the different types of electromagnetic radiation).
ai_role: The Spectrum Visualization Tool (Displays the different wavelengths of the electromagnetic spectrum).
human_expansion: Mapping the range of wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation.

human_role: The Growth Narrator (Explains the stages of cell division).
ai_role: The Chromosome Model (Provides a visual representation of the cell cycle).
human_expansion: Understanding the process of cell division.

human_role: The Boolean Builder (Explains the function of logic gates).
ai_role: The Circuit Simulator (Simulates the operation of logic gates).
